description: Xylem suite server declarations. The installer resolves $PYTHON (the interpreter running the installer), $XYLEM_ROOT (this repo), $XYLEM_PARENT (its parent, i.e. the sibling repos directory), $PROJECT_DIR, and $AGENT_ID placeholders, and reads all url values from environment variables. No URLs or secrets are ever stored in this file.

servers.name: context-keeper
servers.note: CONTEXT_KEEPER_PROJECT is deliberately NOT pinned to $PROJECT_DIR (that froze the server to the install-time project). context-keeper resolves the project per call (CONTEXT_KEEPER_PROJECT env > the shared Xylem session pointer the SessionStart hook writes > cwd/.context discovery), so it follows whichever project the session is in. Set CONTEXT_KEEPER_PROJECT to force a fixed project.

servers.name: agentsync
servers.note: AGENTSYNC_REPO is deliberately NOT pinned to $PROJECT_DIR. agentsync resolves the repo per call (AGENTSYNC_REPO env > the shared Xylem session pointer the SessionStart hook writes), so it coordinates whichever project the session is in. Set AGENTSYNC_REPO to force a fixed repo.

servers.name: agentsync-remote
servers.note: The Worker authenticates on the URL path only (/mcp/<token>); it never reads an Authorization header (claude.ai connectors don't reliably send bearer headers). AGENTSYNC_REMOTE_URL is the full path-token connector URL and is itself the secret -- no header block.

servers.name: cambium
servers.note: CAMBIUM_REPO is deliberately NOT pinned to $PROJECT_DIR: that froze cambium to the install-time project. cambium resolves its repo per call (env > config-file > cwd), and the SessionStart session_primer_hook writes the session's real project into cambium's config file, so the running server follows whatever project the session is in. Set CAMBIUM_REPO in the env only to force a fixed project.

servers.name: context-keeper-remote
servers.note: Remote context-keeper Worker (Cloudflare + D1). Authenticates on the URL path only (/mcp/<token>); it never reads an Authorization header, so CONTEXT_KEEPER_REMOTE_URL is the full path-token connector URL (itself the secret) with no header block. Registered only when CONTEXT_KEEPER_REMOTE_URL is set; the local stdio server is canonical and works without it.
